# [clangd] SIGSEGV when replaying specific LSP sequence (affiliated with reprodution scripts)

**Author:** hongtaihu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/180403
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clangd, crash, generated by fuzzer

## Body

The crash is triggered by a specific LSP message sequence.(Geranted by a Fuzzer)

Environment
- clangd commit: aff5afc48df63615053b2432da198a4932435c3f
- OS: Ubuntu 24.04
- Build: Release
- clangd version 23.0.0git (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git aff5afc48df63615053b2432da198a4932435c3f)

Steps to Reproduce
```bash
cmake -G Ninja -S llvm -B build \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
  -DLLVM_ENABLE_PROJECTS="clang;clang-tools-extra"
ninja -C build clangd

python3 replay.py ./build/bin/clangd . 10 1.0
```

**Expected**
- clangd should process LSP messages normally.

**Actual**
- clangd crashes with SIGSEGV (signal 11) in all runs.

**Reproducer Package**
below 
[clangd_bug_reproducer.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25160715/clangd_bug_reproducer.zip)

## Comments

---

### Comment 3 - hongtaihu

It turns out that the previous crash log was produced using the system clang-18
frontend (clangd fell back to /usr/bin/clang because clang was not built in my
local toolchain).

After building clang-23 and ensuring it is used via PATH, here is the crash log
from the clang-23 frontend:

```bash
ubuntu2404@LAPTOP-R34ONCHE:~/llvm-project/build$ ninja clang
[4104/4104] Creating executable symlink bin/clang
```

```
Stack dump:
0.      /tmp/clangd_8h_export/id_0_time_5862_exec_119424/workspace/main.cxx:99:24: current parser token '{'
Content-Length: 77

{"error":{"code":-32601,"message":"method not found"},"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0"}#0 0x0000555999a499d8 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (./build/bin/clangd+0x4c39d8)
#1 0x0000555999a47575 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (./build/bin/clangd+0x4c1575)
#2 0x0000555999a4aa51 SignalHandler(int, siginfo_t*, void*) Signals.cpp:0:0
#3 0x00007847b3a45330 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x45330)
#4 0x0000555999ba8275 clang::Decl::addAttr(clang::Attr*) (./build/bin/clangd+0x622275)
Signalled during AST worker action: Build AST
  Filename: main.cxx
  Directory: /tmp/clangd_8h_export/id_0_time_5862_exec_119424/workspace
  Command Line: /home/ubuntu2404/llvm-project/build/bin/clang -resource-dir=/home/ubuntu2404/llvm-project/build/lib/clang/23 -- /tmp/clangd_8h_export/id_0_time_5862_exec_119424/workspace/main.cxx
  Version: 1
```
